content.full_text:
JANUARY 25, 1991

PLEASE MAIL TO US THE F.P.P. COMMISSION'S OPINION AS TO WHETHER OR NOT IT IS LAWFUL TO GIVE, IN 1991, A FINANCIAL CONTRIBUTION FOR ELECTION TO A CANDIDATE WHO WILL NOT APPEAR ON AN ELECTION BALLOT UNTIL 1992.

PLEASE BE SO KIND AS TO INCLUDE:

1. COPIES OF FPPC REGULATIONS, IF ANY

2. COPIES OF STATE COURT DECISIONS, IF ANY

3. COPIES OF FEDERAL COURT DECISIONS, IF ANY

4. THE CASE NUMBERS
   LITIGANTS' NAMES
   AND HEARING DATES
   OF ANY LAWSUITS OR ADMINISTRATIVE HEARINGS WHICH HAVE BEEN FILED, BUT HAVE NOT AS YET BEEN DECIDED.

THANK YOU FOR YOUR HELP,

[Signature]
ART LINDEN - CORPORATE RELATIONS
20TH CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY
6301 OWENSMOUTH AVENUE
WOODLAND HILLS, CALIFORNIA
91367
